name: Golf Kings
address: 56 Chambers Brg Rd, Brick Township, NJ 08723
about: Golf Kings is an indoor golf simulator lounge and pro shop with locations in Brick, Toms River, and Wall, New Jersey. The facility offers TrackMan-powered golf simulations, allowing players to experience courses from around the world in a climate-controlled environment. Each bay includes a private TV for watching sports, alongside professional instruction, club fittings, and a pro shop. The venue is designed for both casual play and serious practice, with options for hourly rentals, lessons, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides detailed swing analytics and course simulations
Private TVs in each bay for a personalized entertainment experience
On-site PGA professionals for lessons and club fittings
Flexible booking system for individual and group sessions
Pro shop offers equipment, regripping, and apparel services

food_and_drink.notes: Pro shop available with club rentals, regripping, and apparel
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with detailed swing analytics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs, though club rentals may be available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a pro shop with equipment, but no mention of outside food/drink policies.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Typically 2-3 hours depending on course and player pace.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly policies mentioned, but family groups are welcome.
